title: The Future Will Be Beautiful Too

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Haha. Well this is rare. Out of everyone at training camp, I'm the
first one up and about.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: (As if... It's not like I planned to get up early. I just couldn't sleep.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I should run a little.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
"I'm looking forward to seeing your beautiful dance." "She's so
stunning, her visuals are insane!" "Please post lots of pictures of your
costume!" Hm...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...I thought so. So that's why I was chosen, huh...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...To be a pretty face?

text_block_list.name: Dance Teacher
text_block_list.text: Hmm... No, never mind. You're doing great just as you are!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Really? Well, as long as it's pretty, that's all that matters.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And with that, I think I've done a good job of playing my role.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What do you mean, your role?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Like, my part? I think I was chosen as a mascot this time around. My
image doesn't exactly shout "history" or "tradition" or anything,
y'know?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So I thought I'd do what I do best and make sure this festival goes
viral. I'm serious about the dance, though. I wanna surprise people
with that.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Or at least, that's what I thought would be cutest! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: AAAAAGH! Damn, I'm such a loser!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: (I'm so over being judged by my looks. But all I do is sulk about it.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(Should I accept it, like Curren, and just play out my role properly? Is
that how I'll become my own person and not just a pretty face?)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(No, that can't be it. Curren is Curren. What works for her isn't gonna
work for me...)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Hup! Doo-doo-doo! Then like this!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yukino?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Oh, City! Good morn'n! Um, were you doin' some practice?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, well, something like that. What about you? Practicing the
dance on your own?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Yeah. I'm no good at danc'n c'mpared to you two, and I'm in
the middle for th'best part...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
So at the very least, I just don't want to stand out for th'wrong reason
and ruin it for you—oh my gosh!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you okay? It's too early to be pushing yourself this much.
Besides, I've never once thought you would ruin it or anything like
that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ah... I know, let's go rinse off together. I'm all sweaty too, and the
day hasn't even started.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Wow! It's so thick and fluffy-wuffy, I almost can't believe this is my tail! What a treat, hav'n you wash my tail! Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I just have a few tricks up my sleeve from experience, that's all. The
oil and conditioner did the rest.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
The only reason those tricks worked was because your tail was already
in good condition. That goes for your hair and skin too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and your dance, too. I think you should believe in yourself more,
Yukino!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: City... Hehe! Thank oodles.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
But still, it's an import'nt festival p'formance. I've gotta work harder so
I don't look like a chowderhead up there!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I guess it is important...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Do you like festivals, Yukino?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Hm? Um... Yeah, I s'pose I do.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
We have an autumn fest'val in my hometown too, to celebrate the
harvest. It's real small c'mpared to the Fleetfoot Festival or the one
we went to yesterday, though.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
But it's still a roar'n good time! Food stalls sell the freshly picked
veggies, and we all eat, dance by the fire, and sing the rice-plant'n
song together.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
When wint'r comes, ev'thing gets covered in snow and it goes quiet...
But when I think of the fun of the festival, it perks me right back up!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I see... So that's what festivals mean to you.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... What do they mean to you, City?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What do they mean...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey! So this is where you two were!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. You went for bath time without me? That's so mean! We're the
ceremonial dance trio!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ah?! Gee, I'm sorry! We didn't mean to leave you out!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Apology not accepted! ☆ If you're really sorry... Come to the outdoor bath with me so we can all chat and bathe together! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: C'mon, c'mon! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: (Curren is Curren. Yukino is Yukino...)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Then... what about me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Um, President! Could I talk to you for a minute please?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh, Gold City. What is it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You had some documents about the Fleetfoot Festival, right? Could
I... see them, please?
